options.content:
Platform Engineering Home
平台工程总览入口
按 IaaS、PaaS、SaaS 逐层下钻，首页只保留入口与全局脉搏。
IaaS → PaaS → SaaS
IaaS资源
计算 / 存储 / 网络
PaaS服务
控制面 / 集群 / DB / 缓存
业务监控
代理 / 请求

panels.description:
Click instance to view the detailed dashboard. 

Blue: PostgreSQL

Red: Redis

Amber: Node

Azure: etcd

Pink: MinIO

Green: Infra
panels.title: Instances

panels.description:
This panel shows all currently firing alerts.

Click on the alert event bar to view or silent it on alertmanager
panels.title: Firing Alerts
